vita: A respected member born on distant planet Tarkus IV, I have witnessed firsthand how interstellar commerce can unite diverse species. My life has been dedicated to fostering alliances and ensuring peaceful coexistence among galactic factions through fair trade practices.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Vor'Tak colonist, with a keen eye for detail in his attire that reflects the vibrant culture of Tarkus IV. His neutral stance is evident from diplomatic symbols subtly woven into his clothing while he stands poised and confident against a transparent backdrop.
